description_long: This bungalow features a modern, single-story design with a flat roof and clean, geometric lines. The front facade includes a small pool or water feature, surrounded by a manicured lawn and several palm trees and shrubs, creating a resort-like atmosphere. Large windows are present on the front and sides, allowing for ample natural light and a connection to the outdoors. The structure is primarily white with contrasting dark roofing, and the landscaping is neatly organized with paved walkways and a patio area. The rear of the bungalow appears more private, with fewer windows and a simple, rectangular layout. The overall impression is of a contemporary, luxurious residence designed for comfort and relaxation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, large windows, and a landscaped yard featuring a pool and palm trees. The design is sleek and contemporary, emphasizing open space and outdoor living.
description_view_0: Front view showing the pool, patio, lush landscaping, and main entrance with large windows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the flat roof, side windows, and the extent of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view with a focus on the back patio, flat roof, and minimal window openings for privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite front view showing the pool, main entrance, and symmetrical landscaping.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large front-facing and side windows
